title: Midnight-Craving Saudi-Arabian KFC Fried-Rice
description: A funky and snappy midnight-craving dish that combines Saudi-Arabian flavors with a lacto-vegetarian take on the classic KFC fried rice.
instructions: Heat a small amount of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat until it starts to shimmer.
Add 1 cup of chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add 1 cup of chopped scallions and cook for an additional minute.
Add 2 cups of cooked KFC chicken, broken into small pieces, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of cooked basmati rice to the wok and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add 2 tablespoons of Grand Marnier and stir-fry for another minute, until the liquid is almost completely evaporated.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter or individual bamboo trays and serve immediately.
